quotes: Small steps every day beat big bursts once a month.
You do not have to be extreme — just consistent.
Discipline is choosing what you want most over what you want now.

rewards.name: Rest Day Pass

rewards.name: Focus Boost

rewards.name: Double Time Day
rewards.description: 2× XP on timer sessions for one day.
